mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voice_log (raw_text, semantic_result, device_command, is_valid, source) VALUES (#{rawText}, #{semanticResult}, #{deviceCommand}, #{isValid}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM voice_log ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_log WHERE is_valid = 1 AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
